description_long: This is a dark, rectangular wallet with a flap closure and a subtle, embossed geometric pattern on the front. The wallet appears to be made primarily of leather, with visible stitching along the edges and a slightly worn texture. The front flap features a scalloped edge and a central button or knot detail, possibly serving as part of the closure mechanism. The sides show a compact, slim profile, and the back is plain with minimal decoration. The wallet's surface has a matte finish with some areas of visible wear, suggesting regular use. There is no visible brand logo, but the craftsmanship and detailing indicate a traditional, possibly handcrafted design.
description: A dark leather wallet with an embossed geometric pattern, scalloped flap, and visible stitching, showing signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the embossed geometric pattern, scalloped flap, and central button or knot detail.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and the thickness of the wallet, with visible stitching along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain surface with minimal decoration and some visible wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the compactness and the construction of the wallet's edge.
attribute_visible_wear_or_damage: Visible wear and scuffing on edges and surfaces, especially on the back and corners.
attribute_decorative_pattern: Embossed geometric pattern on the front flap with scalloped edge detailing.
